text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't even call it a problem. I'm<n>thinking about how I can make the<n>Ligne Droite an event meant purely<n>for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm... But right now it isn't?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Not exactly. It seems I'll only bemaking myself happy in the end.Gathering everyone for a granddance... wouldn't be right if I'm theonly one beaming with pride.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Are you certain about that? Isn't itrather that you should be satisfiedwith yourself before consideringanything else?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: However hard you try, everyone will<n>feel differently about the event<n>afterward. That's why the only thing<n>we can really do is... give the best<n>performance we can.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You don't really believe you can<n>make someone else's heart dance<n>without being thrilled yourself, do<n>you? You have to show your own<n>enthusiasm first.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Fuji Kiseki. Excuse<n>me—there's something I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Of course. Good luck! ...I'll alwaysbe here to help you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All right... You can come out now,<n>Shakur. I know you heard all that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: More like I was forced to listen. Just<n>what are you scheming?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Scheming? Why does everyone think<n>I'm so manipulative? I only figured it<n>was a good chance to convince you<n>since you were here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The Droit this year is going to be a hit.If you have time after this, come seehow our dance is going... I'mpositive you'll love it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph, she's a real mastermind. Tch...<n>So it's true. Someone really knew<n>about my account.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (So you're using that as an excuse to<n>get me in the Droit. Ugh... You really<n>know how to be a pain. All for...<n>"memories," was it?)

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much for helping me<n>study! Now I'm sure I won't have to<n>take a makeup exam!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I didn't help at all. You were the ones<n>who came to me asking... Why are<n>you two fools so happy anyway?

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower A
text_block_list.text: You're so mean! But, you know, the<n>school year's almost over, right? I<n>started thinking about how I should<n>prepare more...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Cowards looking for a safety net<n>make me sick. If you're not brave<n>enough to be honest, I won't bother<n>with you next time.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: We can't help thinking, though. About<n>not having regrets... preparing for<n>whatever might happen... wanting to<n>make memories... That's all.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Oh, geez... I sound like a loser!<n>Anyway, we gotta get going. See you<n>later!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: That's a weakness. Just push your<n>regrets down. Don't cling to the<n>past...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Matters of the heart are never simple.<n>It seems we've both become too<n>hardened.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: So? What'd you bring me here for?<n>Don't tell me you've come crying for<n>help again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I've come to try asking you once<n>more. Sirius Symboli, I need your help.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I concede your point. I thought a<n>grand celebration of everyone's<n>milestone would make them happy.<n>That was... simply my ego.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Then why are you asking for my help<n>again? If you understand it was all<n>about your own ego, then—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's stubbornness. I'm justgoing to say it—I want to be happywith this. I want to mold it all into aresult I can be satisfied with. I wanteverything.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's why I need your assistance.<n>You know how far my voice can carry<n>an idea. But there are limits to where<n>it reaches. And thus...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: You'd stoop to using me. You really<n>need to stop disrespecting people.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: But all right. I'll pitch in. Not like I can<n>stop anyone from going anyway.<n>Remember, this is in no way for your<n>approval or for my followers' sakes.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Think of it as a reward for admitting<n>your arrogance. Enjoy it, Emperor<n>Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let me add that I do want you tocome as well. You're just asimportant a student as anyone atTracen.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hah, what was that? I'd never accept<n>such a pitiful invitation.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Ohh! The prim and proper emperormust not know how to make agood invitation. How about I teachyou some tricks of the trade?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Wasn't it me who used to teachyou?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You won't get another chance. Give<n>me your hand, Sirius. I'll continue our<n>lesson where we left off.

text_block_list.name: Young Rudolf
text_block_list.text: One, two, three... One, two, three...<n>Good, you're really getting it.

text_block_list.name: Young Sirius
text_block_list.text: ...Heh, I knew it! Hey, I'm going to get<n>even better—because I'm the only<n>one who can give you what you<n>want!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you never managed to forget<n>what I taught you. Following my lead<n>seems to suit you better.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Just shut up and let me lead already!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Very well... You know, it's strange.<n>Dancing with you now is much more...<n>fun.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Acting like everything comes so<n>easy... That attitude of hers has<n>always pissed me off.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, how long do you plan on hiding?<n>Nobody likes a peeping Tom.

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Follower B
text_block_list.text: Ah, u-um, you're dancing was just...<n>too amazing! I got all confused and<n>thought I was in a palace ballroom...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Spare me. What do you want?
